name: tb-gen
description: Testbench generation agent — spawned by mas-gen for TB, TC, and simulation

env._MODEL_NAME_hint: Override LLM_MODEL_NAME here for tb-gen-specific routing (e.g. deepseek-v4-pro for stronger debug-fix loops). Leave this hint key in place; it's ignored by the loader. To activate, add a real key/value: "LLM_MODEL_NAME": "deepseek-v4-pro"
